excerpts.excerpt:
Because the wise and noble father will be
there to hold it down.
Catherine smiles from Ronald’s charm and Tyler just shakes his head.
CATHERINE
Yeah? And who’s that? If you see him, you
can send him my way.
EXT. STREET - SUNSET
Tyler is jogging along a canal... Even though it’s 90 plus degrees,
he’s in full sweats...
INT. BATHROOM - LATER THAT NIGHT
Tyler takes off his sweats. He’s drenched and wearing a garbage bag
underneath his clothes, so that he sweats even more. Tyler steps onto
a scale. He’s at 148.... Tyler looks up and stares at his reflection.
INT. DOWNSTAIRS - LATER
Tyler sits in the kitchen and eats a can of tuna with some raw
spinach for dinner... He boils some water and makes a mouth piece....
Tyler plays a song on the piano and hums along to it... He’s actually
really great. Clearly, he grew up playing... Tyler finishes his song
and rolls his left shoulder around.

RONALD (CONT'D)
Okay... That’s what I’m talkin bout. Let
me get a good look at you... Feel good?
Tyler nods. ‘Lvl’ by A$AP Rocky hits on.
INT. DOCTOR’S OFFICE - DAY
Tyler sits in the hallway of a doctor’s office. His ear buds are in as
he watches a wrestling match on his phone... Tyler goes inside a very
loud MRI machine, etc...
INT. BATHROOM - DAY
Tyler does crunches in the bathroom with full sweats on. The shower is
on and it’s turning the bathroom into a steam room.
EXT. CONSTRUCTION SITE - DAY
Tyler watches as Ronald manages employees on the construction site.
Ronald seems valued and respected... Soon, Tyler and Ronald walk
together, alone, along the site.

I know, I know...
ALEXIS (CONT'D)
You don’t... I don’t know if I can do an
abortion.
TYLER
What are you talking about?!!
ALEXIS
STOP YELLING-
TYLER (CONT'D)
I’M NOT-
ALEXIS (CONT'D)
This isn’t your body! It’s mine!
TYLER
It doesn’t matter- Are you being serious
right now?!
ALEXIS
Yes-
My mom had an abortion and
she said she regretted it the
rest of her life-
TYLER (CONT'D)
I can’t believe I’m having
this conversation-
I don’t give a shit! This
isn’t about your fuckin mom!

TYLER
Yeah, yeah. I talked to
her. We good. Want
a beer?
Meet you outside.
Tyler heads through the kitchen, past the dance floor, and towards the
stairs... Tyler makes his way up the stairs...
The music continually builds as Tyler gets to the top of the stairs to
see Alexis and her date go down a hallway and into a room. They close
the door behind them, and the CAMERA pushes down the hallway past
family photos...
The CAMERA pushes back towards Tyler’s face as devastation builds...
The music grows with Tyler’s hurt....
* NOTE * This will be one unbroken take from the time Tyler gets out
of his truck, until now. As the CAMERA pushes down the hallway, the
black bars at the top and bottom of the screen begin to close in
‘Be Above It (Erol Alkan Rework)’ by Tame Impala slams on.
Tyler is drinking even more in the kitchen. He does a shot and drinks
a beer as a chaser. Now, there is a trippy strobe light hitting the
dance floor. Tyler closes his eyes... Images flash through Tyler’s
mind of him and Alexis the last time they were in the ocean and in
love...

Wake up! Please! Lex.... I’m sorry... I’m
so sorry-
All of a sudden, the door swings open. A girl is standing there in
shock and then she lets out a HORRIFIED SCREAM!
* NOTE * now in 1.33:1 aspect ratio and handheld
INT. CHANG’S HOUSE - CONTINUOUS
Emily is still sitting on the living room couch when she hears the
scream. She stands up and begins walking behind a bunch of kids,
towards the garage... More screaming:
RANDOM KIDS
SOMEONE CALL THE COPS! OH MY GOD! CALL
911! CALL A FUCKING AMBULANCE!
Emily pushes through a horde of kids that are freaking out.
Soon, horror and devastation begin to fill Emily’s face. We see
Emily’s point of view of a bloody Alexis on the ground. The CAMERA
pans left to see the side door, leading outside, wide open...
EXT. OUTSIDE OF CHANG’S HOUSE - CONTINUOUS
The CAMERA is running behind Tyler as he approaches his truck... Tyler
gets in his truck and slams the door.
INT. TYLER’S TRUCK - CONTINUOUS
Tyler is still crying and in shock as he starts up his truck and
throws it in reverse- BOOM
Tyler smashes into the car behind him.
CLOSE UP as Tyler puts his truck in drive.

INT. THEATER ARTS CLASS - CONTINUOUS
Emily is sitting in her theater class as MR. STANLEY speaks:
MR. STANLEY
This is it, people. It’s the last tournament of
the year, so anyone that needs their credit
better sign on up. It’s been a great year...
INT. OUTSIDE OF THEATER CLASS - CONTINUOUS
Emily finishes signing a piece of paper hanging on the wall in the
hallway outside of Mr. Stanley’s... Emily is walking away, when she
suddenly bumps into a BOY (17):
EMILY
Sorry-
BOY
No... My fault-
Emily leaves, but she turns around to see the boy watching her walk
away. This is the wrestler that Tyler made bleed in wrestling
practice, except his braces are gone now and his hair is different...
EXT. OUTSIDE OF STADIUM - CONTINUOUS
Emily walks past an empty school stadium. The same stadium where she
used to practice drills with Alexis and where Tyler would work out...
A few kids wearing graduation outfits walk past Emily...
INT. DENTIST OFFICE - CONTINUOUS
Emily is sitting in a dentist chair, having her braces removed...

BOY
Cool... I’m Luke, by the way.
EMILY
Emily.
Luke awkwardly walks away and Emily studies him... ‘Moonlight Serenade’
by Glen Miller comes on.
FADE TO:
INT. DINER - CONTINUOUS
Emily and Luke are sitting at the same diner we were at before with
Emily’s family. They are looking at their menus and sitting in
silence. Each not sure what to say...
EMILY
... I’m not really that
hungry-
LUKE
No? We could just split
something?
EMILY (CONT'D)
Oh... Okay, sure.
LUKE
... I’m not gonna lie. I wasn’t sure if
you’d actually show up.
EMILY
Really? Why?

INT. RONALD’S CAR - CONTINUOUS
Ronald is driving Emily through a parking lot. He is giving her a
driving lesson and talking about how to use your mirrors...
Ronald’s energy and demeanor are very different than they used to
be. He’s softer, less put together than he was and it goes past
the fact that he’s different with Emily than he was with Tyler.
INT. EMILY’S BATHROOM - CONTINUOUS
Emily stares at her reflection in the mirror and examines her
body... She sucks in her belly, grabs the skin under her arms,
etc.... She’s not pleased with what she sees...
EXT. CANAL - SUNSET
Emily looks out at the water. We can see a hint of something swimming.
LUKE
Manatees!
EMILY (V.O.)
I really wanna do something with animals.
I love animals...
EXT. EVERGLADES ZOO - CONTINUOUS
Emily and Luke eat alligator while a peacock hangs out near by...
Luke slips trying to look at baby ducks and Emily cracks up... They
go to a tiny zoo and see albino alligators, birds, etc.
LUKE (V.O.)
So, you wanna be a vet?

LUKE
Shit. That sucks.
EMILY
... Have you told her about me?
LUKE
Who? My mom?
Emily nods.
LUKE (CONT'D)
As a matter a fact, I have-
EMILY
Really?
LUKE (CONT'D)
Yep.
EMILY
What’d you say?
LUKE
I don’t know... That I met this amazing girl.
Emily smiles for a beat, then her energy shifts.
EMILY
... Did you tell her who I was?
LUKE
Nah- Not yet...
EMILY
You just told her you met an amazing girl?

LUKE
Okay, okay...
Emily goes back to singing. We listen.....
The chorus hits:
EMILY (CONT'D)
Put on the dress that I likeee! It makes me so
crazy though I can’t say whyyyyyyy! Keep on your
stockings for awhileeeee. Some kind of magic in
the way you’re lying there!
CUT TO:
Now, they drive through the night as Emily does her makeup and tries
to get ready the best she can in Luke’s jeep...
EMILY (CONT'D)
Ugh. I look like crap-
Oh, shut up!
LUKE
No, you don’t! You don’t even
need any makeup, and I love
your hair like-
I’m serious!
INT. ABANDONED HOUSE - CONTINUOUS
Now, Emily and Luke are hanging out with Luke’s friends in an
abandoned house.

EMILY (CONT'D)
She doesn’t hate you.
RONALD (CONT'D)
I don’t know what else to do. She’s just
shutting down... She’s not working-
Couldn’t, even if she wanted to. The
company won’t recover...
(MORE)
RONALD (CONT'D)
We’re just losing money... Just- I love
her so much, but I’m losing her and I
don’t know what to do... I’m sorry- I’m
sorry-
EMILY
What? Why are you sorry?
RONALD
I shouldn’t be telling you
all this-
EMILY (CONT'D)
No-
RONALD (CONT'D)
I just have no one else to talk to.
EMILY
No- It’s good, dad. I’m happy you’re
telling me this.
